name: Chocolate Icebox Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the butter until fluffy.
2. Add the brown sugar and granulated sugar and beat until well blended.
3. Add the egg and vanilla and beat until thickened.
4. Beat in the melted chocolate, then add 3/4 cup of the flour along with the baking soda and salt.
5. Stir in the remaining 1 cup flour to make a soft dough.
6. Divide the dough in half.
7. Wrap each half in plastic wrap and shape it into a 6-inch log.
8. Refrigerate until firm (up to 1 week or frozen for up to 2 months).
9. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
10. Using a thin knife, slice each log into pieces that are 1/8 inch to 1/4 inch thick.
11. Arrange the cookies about 1 inch apart on a buttered cookie sheet.
12. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes or until lightly browned.
